summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dashboard SLA Integration and Access Tier Scope features. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Dashboard showing unified SLA Status section (On Track, At Risk, Breached, Unacknowledged KPIs), SLA KPIs linking to SLA module with correct filters, and Policy creation dialog showing Access Tier section with checkboxes.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/stats returns correct structure (orders.on_track, orders.at_risk, orders.breached, escalations.unacknowledged)
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint works but sla_breaching_count not used in Admin Dashboard KPIs
Backend: SLA stats consistency verified between /monitoring/stats and /monitoring/at-risk, /monitoring/breached endpoints
Backend: GET /api/access-tiers returns access tiers (Free, Starter, Growth, Scale, Partner)
Backend: POST /api/sla-policies creates policy with access_tier_ids in scope
Backend: PUT /api/sla-policies/{id} updates policy with access_tier_ids
Backend: Policy scope includes all types: role_ids, team_ids, specialty_ids, access_tier_ids
Backend: POST /api/sla-policies/check triggers policy evaluation
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/history returns escalation history
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/at-risk returns at-risk orders
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/breached returns breached orders
Backend: Policy response includes all expected fields including access_tier_ids and access_tier_names
Frontend: Dashboard shows unified SLA Status section with 4 KPIs (On Track: 30, At Risk: 0, Breached: 0, Unacknowledged: 0)
Frontend: Old 'SLA Breaching' KPI NOT shown in Admin Dashboard Order Status KPIs
Frontend: On Track KPI links to /sla-policies?tab=monitoring&status=on_track
Frontend: At Risk KPI links to /sla-policies?tab=monitoring&status=at_risk
Frontend: Breached KPI links to /sla-policies?tab=monitoring&status=breached
Frontend: Unacknowledged KPI links to /sla-policies?tab=history
Frontend: SLA module shows same stats as Dashboard (single source of truth)
Frontend: Policy creation dialog shows Policy Scope section
Frontend: Policy Scope includes Roles, Teams, Specialties, Access Tiers columns with checkboxes
Frontend: Access Tiers shows: Free, Starter, Growth, Scale, Partner options
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: AdminDashboard correctly fetches from /api/sla-policies/monitoring/stats and displays 4 SLA KPIs
Dashboard.js: SLA KPIs wrapped in Link components with correct filter parameters
Dashboard.js: Old sla_breaching_count from dashboard/stats is NOT displayed in Admin Dashboard
sla_policy.py: SLAPolicyScope model includes access_tier_ids and access_tier_names fields
sla_policies.py: get_scope_names helper populates access_tier_names from access_tier_ids
sla_policy_engine.py: auto_apply_policy_to_order checks access_tier_ids in scope matching
SLAPolicies.js: PolicyDialog shows 4-column Policy Scope with Roles, Teams, Specialties, Access Tiers
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed policies during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard SLA Integration and Access Tier Scope features are fully functional. Key verifications: (1) Dashboard shows unified SLA Status section with On Track, At Risk, Breached, Unacknowledged KPIs fetched from /api/sla-policies/monitoring/stats. (2) Each SLA KPI links to SLA module with correct tab and status filter. (3) Old 'SLA Breaching' KPI removed from Admin Dashboard. (4) SLA stats match between Dashboard and SLA module (single source of truth). (5) Policy scope includes access_tier_ids field in backend model. (6) Policy creation dialog shows Access Tier section with checkboxes for Free, Starter, Growth, Scale, Partner. (7) Policy engine auto_apply considers access_tier_ids in scope matching.

dashboard_sla_status.unified_sla_section: WORKING - Dashboard shows SLA Status section with 4 KPIs
dashboard_sla_status.on_track_kpi: WORKING - Shows count and links to /sla-policies?tab=monitoring&status=on_track
dashboard_sla_status.at_risk_kpi: WORKING - Shows count and links to /sla-policies?tab=monitoring&status=at_risk
dashboard_sla_status.breached_kpi: WORKING - Shows count and links to /sla-policies?tab=monitoring&status=breached
dashboard_sla_status.unacknowledged_kpi: WORKING - Shows count and links to /sla-policies?tab=history
dashboard_sla_status.old_sla_breaching_removed: WORKING - Old 'SLA Breaching' KPI not shown in Admin Dashboard

sla_stats_consistency.single_source_of_truth: WORKING - Dashboard and SLA module show same stats from /api/sla-policies/monitoring/stats

access_tier_scope.backend_model: WORKING - SLAPolicyScope includes access_tier_ids and access_tier_names
access_tier_scope.backend_routes: WORKING - get_scope_names populates access_tier_names from IDs
access_tier_scope.policy_engine: WORKING - auto_apply_policy_to_order checks access_tier_ids in scope matching
access_tier_scope.frontend_dialog: WORKING - Policy creation dialog shows Access Tiers column with checkboxes
